title: Oyedaea hypomalaca
taxonomy: Oyedaea hypomalaca is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is further classified within the subfamily Asteroideae and tribe Madieae. Oyedaea hypomalaca is native to Hawaii and is considered an endemic species, meaning it is found only in this region. The exact classification of Oyedaea hypomalaca may be subject to change as new research emerges. Further research is needed to fully understand the taxonomic classification of this plant.
